name: Express Tunnel Car Wash - High Traffic Interstate Location
description: Established express tunnel car wash on high-visibility interstate corridor. 4 years old, modern equipment, $0 deferred maintenance. Unlimited wash club membership base of 1,800+ members generating $54,000/mo recurring. Excellent real estate lease terms. Turnkey operation with trained staff.
equipment: 2020 PDQ equipment, updated LED lighting, full-service vacuums

name: Full-Service Detail & Wash Center - Houston Suburbs
description: Premier full-service car wash and detail center in affluent Sugar Land suburb. Serving the community for 12 years. Strong repeat customer base. Full detailing services generate premium margins. Owner retiring after long tenure. Seller financing available for qualified buyers.
realEstate: Real estate available for purchase at additional $850K

name: 3-Location Express Wash Portfolio - Carolinas
description: Rare 3-location express tunnel portfolio in Charlotte metro area. All built 2019-2022. Combined 6,200+ unlimited wash club members. Centralized management structure in place. Perfect PE platform acquisition or bolt-on. All sites on owned real estate included in price.
equipment: Sonny's equipment across all 3 sites, unified POS system
realEstate: All 3 parcels owned, included in asking price

name: Self-Serve 6-Bay Car Wash - Rural Ohio
description: Classic 6-bay self-serve car wash in stable rural Ohio market. Consistent coin and card revenue for 15+ years. Minimal staffing required. Perfect semi-absentee investment. New roof 2024, freshly painted, updated payment systems. Owner portfolio consolidation — not distressed.
equipment: Mark VII equipment, updated card readers 2024

name: In-Bay Automatic + Lube Center Combo - Denver
description: Combination in-bay automatic car wash and 4-bay quick lube center. Two revenue streams with one operating overhead. Loyal customer base using both services. Owner moving out of state. Significant growth potential — current owner has not marketed the wash membership program.
equipment: Ryko Soft Touch 2018, 4-bay hydraulic lube equipment
realEstate: Owned real estate, available separately at $650K

name: Express Tunnel Car Wash - Phoenix Growth Corridor
description: High-performing express tunnel in booming Chandler, AZ. One of the fastest-growing cities in America. 2,400+ unlimited membership base, 160-foot tunnel. Modern construction 2021. Excellent curb appeal, high-traffic retail corridor. First time to market. Owner diversifying into other ventures.
equipment: PDQ 2021, full LED, vacuum stations, fragrance center

name: Full-Service Hand Wash & Detail - Manhattan
description: Long-standing full-service hand wash and detail operation in Manhattan. Institutional-grade clientele including hotel contracts and fleet accounts. 18-year operating history. Lease secured through 2032 at below-market rate. Rare opportunity in dense urban market with very high barriers to entry.
equipment: Hand wash bays, 4 enclosed detail suites

name: 5-Location Tunnel Portfolio - Southeast Florida
description: Institutional-quality 5-location express tunnel portfolio in South Florida's premium markets. Locations in Boca Raton, Delray Beach, Boynton Beach, and West Palm Beach. 14,500+ combined membership base. Professional management team in place. Built 2018-2023. Ideal for regional operator or PE fund seeking scaled entry to Florida.
equipment: Mixed Sonny's and PDQ, all under manufacturer warranty

name: Automated Express Wash - Minneapolis Suburb
description: High-volume express tunnel in Eden Prairie — consistently ranked one of Minnesota's best suburbs. 1,650+ monthly members. Fully automated, minimal staffing. Located on major arterial road with 38,000 daily traffic count. 2019 build, equipment in excellent condition. Seller wants clean exit.

name: Mobile Car Wash & Detail Service - Atlanta
description: Profitable mobile car wash and detailing business serving Atlanta metro. 3 fully-equipped vans, trained teams, B2B corporate accounts (office parks, dealerships), and residential subscription clients. Strong online reviews, booking app in place. Asset-light model with huge growth potential. Perfect for operator seeking low overhead.
equipment: 3 Sprinter vans, fully equipped with water tanks, pumps, supplies

name: High-Volume Express Tunnel - Dallas Metroplex
description: Top-performing express tunnel in affluent Plano, TX. Adjacent to major retail hub. 3,100+ unlimited wash club members generating $93K/mo recurring. Owner-operator model — perfect for hands-on buyer or regional group. Traffic counts exceeding 50,000 cars/day on this corridor. Never been on the market before.

name: In-Bay Automatic - Gas Station Combination
description: Gas station + in-bay automatic car wash combo in high-traffic Columbus location. Synergistic businesses — gas customers convert to wash customers naturally. Strong fuel volume. Wash generates $28K/mo standalone. Total property on .8 acre. Real estate included. Excellent value for dual-revenue asset.
